SL_Works_Section.description: Locate the 'SL Works' sub-heading under the Method of Supply Requirement section. Identify specific tasks such as 'Remove SL' and 'Install new SL'.

SL_Material_Funding.description: Customer Funded Contestable Works: All other works required.

Document Remittance and Restriction Requ.description: Email for remittance copies: remittances@endeavourenergy.com.au. Credit cards and cheques are not accepted.

Invoice Policy.description: Formal Tax Invoice is provided following the receipt of payment.

LandInterestGuidelines.description: No specific mention of 'Land Interests' section or checkbox for 'NA' in the provided sections.

RequiredEasements.description: No details regarding required easements for new HV/LV lines or substation sites found in the provided sections.

PropertyAccessConditions.description: No specific conditions regarding access to private property or creation of right-of-ways for Endeavour Energy assets found in the provided sections.

items.item_description: Spare HV duct as per Fact Sheet 11

items.funding_category: reimbursements to be paid to Endeavour Energy by Customer

items.item_description: Network switching, substation commissioning, contract inspection

LV Works.description: Remove the Overhead (OH) LV cable currently located between pole ref '23' and pole ref '20' on the southern side of Elizabeth Drive.
String a new OH cable between pole ref '3' and pole ref '20' on the northern side of Elizabeth Drive.

Compliance Standards.description: Ensure all LV service works comply with the NSW Service and Installation Rules.
Confirm the design adheres to Endeavour Energy standards MDI0031 and MCI0005.

Service Connections.description: New OH road crossing service connection intended to maintain existing services.

Primary HV Method of Supply.description: Removal of Assets: OH HV cables between specific pole refs
Installation of Assets: new OH HV cable locations

HV Infrastructure Funding and Materials.description: Reimbursement Paid by Endeavour Energy: Capital contribution for Spare HV duct as per Fact Sheet 11
Reimbursements to be paid to Endeavour Energy by Customer: Duct usage charge as required
Customer Funded Non-Contestable Works: Network switching, substation commissioning, contract inspection

Compliance Standards.description: Ensure HV design meets mandatory codes: MDI0031, MCI0005, and NSW Service and Installation Rules
